description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements beyond basic tags like <div> and <span>, gauging the learner's ability to apply proper markup for improved accessibility and SEO. It is moderately challenging, using a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges participants to adopt best practices. The quiz aims to reinforce semantic HTML skills while keeping the experience fun and motivational.
Topics: HTML5 semantic elements, Proper use of <header>, <nav>, <section>, <article>, <footer>, etc., Accessibility and SEO considerations, Difference between generic and semantic tags
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone with basic HTML experience who wants to deepen their understanding of modern, semantic markup.
